title: experiment_definition/i15-1/hot_air_blower
description: A variable temperature data collection on I15-1 using the hot air blower. Can be one PDF or multiple PDFs at each temperature.

list_of_temperatures.title: List of Blower Temperatures (C)
list_of_temperatures.description: The required temperatures in degrees Celsius. Individual data points will be collected at these temperatures after a short thermal stabilisation time.

ramp_rate.title: Blower Ramp Rate (C/min)
ramp_rate.description: The required ramp rate for the blower in C/min. The values need to be multiples of 6.

settle_time.title: Settle time per temperature point (seconds)
settle_time.description: The required settle time per temperature point in seconds.
